ns0:entry.ns0:title: CopilotKit/CopilotKit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit
Language: typescript
The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React + Angular. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
Language: typescript
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/checkout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/checkout
Language: typescript
Action for checking out a repo

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/superset
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/superset
Language: typescript
Apache Superset is a Data Visualization and Data Exploration Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: backnotprop/plannotator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/backnotprop/plannotator
Language: typescript
Annotate and review coding agent plans and code diffs visually, share with your team, send feedback to agents with one click.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cyberpapiii/chipotlai-max
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cyberpapiii/chipotlai-max
Language: typescript
The AI coding agent that runs on stolen Chipotle compute 🌯 Fork of OpenCode with Pepper AI as default model. Community project to add providers from Home Depot, Lowes, Target, Starbucks & more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lfnovo/open-notebook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook
Language: typescript
An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: makeplane/plane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/makeplane/plane
Language: typescript
🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mui/base-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mui/base-ui
Language: typescript
Unstyled UI components for building accessible web apps and design systems. From the creators of Radix, Floating UI, and Material UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
Language: typescript
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

ns0:entry.ns0:title: reconurge/flowsint
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/reconurge/flowsint
Language: typescript
A modern platform for visual, flexible, and extensible graph-based investigations. For cybersecurity analysts and investigators.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/refactoringhq/tolaria
